info.title: School Management System API Documentation
info.description: Interactive API playground for managing multi-tenant schools, staff, and authentication matrices.

bearerAuth.description: Enter your JWT token in the format: Bearer <token>

post.summary: Authenticate user and fetch security access token

200.description: Authentication successful, returns user object and payload token.

401.description: Invalid Email or Password configuration errors.

post.summary: Initialize private password via random onboarding token

400.description: Missing parameters or invalid/expired invitation token configuration.

post.summary: Provision a new school entity and its primary tenant administrator account

201.description: School created and secure verification email dispatched smoothly.

401.description: Missing or malformed Authorization core header.

403.description: Access Denied: User role lack super_admin clearance tiers.

500.description: Stored Procedure database transaction error or rollback exception.

get.summary: Fetch data directory matching all registered schools alongside their active/pending admins

403.description: Forbidden tier permissions context access barrier.

post.summary: Provision a new institutional staff or teacher record

201.description: Staff member committed to system database grid successfully.

400.description: Validation Error: Incomplete request payload or missing token properties.

500.description: Database signal rejection or duplicate unique email constraint violation.

get.summary: Fetch directory list matching all registered staff within the admin's school

401.description: Unauthorized: Invalid or missing token profile context.

403.description: Access Denied: Only users holding school_admin privileges can invoke this directory view.

put.summary: Modify profile details of an existing institutional staff member

200.description: Staff profile row structural attributes altered successfully.

400.description: Incomplete request body payload variables configuration.

500.description: Access Denied / Not Found or Target resource ownership check mismatch failure.

delete.summary: Permanently purge an isolated staff record from the institutional registry

parameters.name: staffId
parameters.description: The exact database primary key index string identifier of the staff record row to be purged

200.description: Target profile dropped from relational database matrix schema.

400.description: Missing required URL query context identification indices strings.

500.description: Access Denied: Record not found or belongs to a different school instance database.

get.summary: Fetch master payroll list matching staff profiles and salary configurations

post.summary: Attach a new base compensation index mapping layer to a staff profile

put.summary: Alter base salary data row configurations matching a staff parameter

delete.summary: Purge salary entry rows away from structural relational charts

post.summary: Add a new department for the school

get.summary: Get all departments configuration array for the school

200.description: Successfully retrieved school departments structured array list.

delete.summary: Remove a department by path parameter ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the department to drop

post.summary: Create a new master global class template

500.description: Database constraint violation (e.g. duplicate string row value).

get.summary: Retrieve all global master class templates

200.description: List of global classes fetched successfully.

post.summary: Select/map a global class template to the school footprint

201.description: Class added to institutional catalog successfully.

400.description: Bad Request - Missing class_id target pointer.

get.summary: List all class mappings selected by the current school admin

200.description: School classes profile grid retrieved cleanly.

delete.summary: Remove a class tracking assignment link from the school footprint

post.summary: Add a new localized building block division section string

get.summary: Fetch institutional section divisions list setup arrays

200.description: Sections profile data array array sent back successfully.

put.summary: Modify character code identifier mapping for an explicit section node

delete.summary: Purge localized division layout target mapping record

post.summary: Instantiate active school academic calendar combinations structural batch link profile

201.description: Functional matrix grouping batch generated tracking grid setup complete.

get.summary: Fetch full dynamic matrix relational list mapping across all configured school batches

200.description: Full school batch data returned cleanly.

put.summary: Modify configuration elements inside an already running student academic tracking batch link

200.description: Batch structural profile attributes changed safely.

delete.summary: Drop a student academic structural batch tracking record vector layout row index line

put.summary: Toggle operational status of a specific school batch record

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique batch ID to toggle

400.description: Missing parameter or invalid target ID syntax.

404.description: Target batch record could not be found.

500.description: Database connection error or internal server exception.

message.example: Internal database query execution timeout error.

post.summary: Create a new school period / daily lecture slot

get.summary: Get all school periods configured for a specific branch

parameters.name: branch_id
parameters.description: Filter operational period blocks by target school branch ID

200.description: Collection of configured branch slot frames returned successfully.

400.description: Missing query filter parameter validation values.

put.summary: Update an existing branch school period frame configuration block

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Primary identity row integer index key to alter

400.description: Target indexing block not found tracking errors.

delete.summary: Drop a school period permanently from master records

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique period ID to delete

put.summary: Invert operational validity status flags on a period block

get.summary: Retrieve all school subjects for the authenticated user's institution

200.description: List of school subjects fetched successfully.

put.summary: Update metadata properties of an existing subject configuration

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique subject table primary identifier key

400.description: Target reference identification index layout not found.

delete.summary: Drop a specific school subject record index entirely

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Target structural unique identifier to drop

put.summary: Toggle active state status visibility on a target subject

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique subject ID index key to flip status for
